summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of VTC luxury chauffeur website. All major features working correctly with excellent black and gold color scheme implementation.
passed_tests: Hero section displays with luxury car background image and proper content
Navigation bar with all 5 links (Accueil, Services, Réserver, À propos, Contact) working
Services section with all 4 service cards (Trajets Ponctuels, Mise à Disposition, Transferts Aéroports, Affaires) displaying correctly
Booking form with functional date picker, time selector, pickup/dropoff inputs, and transfer type selector
Interactive map with Paris location marker using CartoDB dark tiles
Why Choose Us section with 4 feature cards displaying correctly
Testimonials section with 3 testimonials showing properly
Footer with contact info and 3 social links (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn)
WhatsApp floating button with correct URL format and message encoding
Mobile responsive navigation menu opening and closing correctly
Gold (#D4AF37) and black (#0A0A0A) color scheme consistently applied throughout
Form inputs accepting user data correctly
Responsive design working on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
